CheckTitle: Okta blocks anonymized proxy access with active Network Zone blocklists
Description: Okta should use an active Network Zone blocklist, including gateway/proxy IP entries or an Enhanced Dynamic Zone anonymizer category, to block anonymized proxy access before authentication.
Risk: If anonymized proxies are not blocked before authentication, attackers can hide source networks and attempt credential attacks or session establishment from untrusted infrastructure.

Code.Other: Security > Networks: configure BlockedIpZone gateway/proxy IP entries or activate DefaultEnhancedDynamicZone / Enhanced Dynamic Zone blocklisting for anonymizers.

Recommendation.Text: Configure an active IP Network Zone blocklist or activate an Enhanced Dynamic Zone blocklist that covers anonymizers.
